name: Great Ff Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup brown sugar (or honey or brown rice syrup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Blend bananas, applesauce, vanilla extract, and brown sugar in a blender until creamy.
3. Sift together whole wheat flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients.
5. Stir in oatmeal and raisins (if using).
6. Drop generous spoonfuls of dough onto a cooking-sprayed cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 20-30 minutes or until just golden brown. Check after 15 minutes to ensure they are done, as the lack of oil causes them to take longer than usual to bake.
8. Turn off and let cool completely before serving.
Note: This recipe has worked very nicely for me twice.
